Go to LinkedIn to learn more about my connections, and qualifications.

linksArray.name: Resumé
extra: (Dec. 2023 to present) Equity Prime Mortgage - Senior Software Engineer (Dec. 2023 to present) Specializing in crafting admin panels and controls for the configurability of the main application.
(Feb. 2018 to Jul. 2023) Home Point Financial Corporation - Senior Software Engineer.  Everything UI.
(Jan. 2012 to Feb. 2018) UniteU - Staff Technologist - Site customization for discerning clients, and general template improvement.

linksArray.name: EPMX
extra: ( React, Typescript,  Redux, Node, Express, MongoDB) Highly configurable, mortgage broker facing, portal to encompass.
I've created and extended the CMS/Configuration capabilities of the application. Crafted light, contextual and searchable, in-app, help panel.

linksArray.name: RARR Recovery
extra: (React, Typescript, Chakra) Site, still in development. It provides real 10th step forms, wrapped in a fictional recovery program for monsters,  Ragers and Rampagers Recovering. Results remain private, but can be copied and sent to an accountability buddy.
The monster recovery theme came from a comic I self published.

linksArray.name: SkullyFlower
extra: For almost 20 years, this has housed my personal brand, Skullyflower. Concocted a system for showing my work and offering up products.
And every Fall it is haunted with various ghosts!
Over the years, as I new languages, tricks or frameworks, I've refactored the site. Currently, I am slowly reworking it to use TypeScript and zustand.

hiremeintro: Experienced, purpose driven, front end focused, Sr. Software Engineer
hiremeText: I’ve developed a passion for crafting the forms, dials, and switches that help other people work or manage their work environments. I create UX solutions that make sense and put what people need where they need it in a way that's intuitive and stylish.

“Dragon is a fantastic front-end developer who is an asset to every team she joins. She brings both deep technical knowledge and a willingness to jump in and help with anything. In fact, that customer focus/product mindset is one of her biggest strengths. She was often requested by name by our professional services customers because of her attention to detail and focus on helping the customer achieve their vision.” - Aaron Witt, Enterprise Cloud Architect | Engineering Leader | DevOps Devotee

I am full-stack capable and adept at quickly learning new languages and frameworks, and have never held a purely front-end position. My experience spans from PHP to C# to Node.js, and from HTML and jQuery to modern libraries like React. I have worked with various databases, version control systems, and hosting environments, collaborating effectively within diverse teams. I am well-versed in agile methodologies and have comprehensive experience with the entire software development life cycle—ranging from requirements gathering and architecture design to deployment and ongoing maintenance.

While not a designer, I do work well with designers, not simply replicating static designs but transforming them into dynamic, responsive pieces of code that adapt seamlessly to different screens sizes and data shapes.
